# spaceShooter Development Guidelines

Auto-generated from all feature plans. Last updated: 2026-03-10

## Active Technologies
- JavaScript ES2020+ and Markdown documentation + Existing game modules under `src/`; lightweight JS test runner (Vitest or browser harness) (002-full-game-testing)
- Local filesystem for test reports and baselines; browser `localStorage` validation for leaderboard behavior (002-full-game-testing)

- JavaScript ES2020+ (vanilla, no transpilation) + None — Canvas 2D API, Web Storage API (localStorage), and standard DOM APIs only (001-mvp-core-game)

## Project Structure

```text
src/
tests/
```

## Commands

npm test; npm run lint

## Code Style

JavaScript ES2020+ (vanilla, no transpilation): Follow standard conventions

## Recent Changes
- 002-full-game-testing: Added JavaScript ES2020+ and Markdown documentation + Existing game modules under `src/`; lightweight JS test runner (Vitest or browser harness)

- 001-mvp-core-game: Added JavaScript ES2020+ (vanilla, no transpilation) + None — Canvas 2D API, Web Storage API (localStorage), and standard DOM APIs only
